title: Attack on Titan: THE LAST ATTACK
originalTitle: 劇場版「進撃の巨人」完結編 THE LAST ATTACK
posterAlt: Attack on Titan: THE LAST ATTACK (2024) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A colossal-sized omnibus film bringing together the last two episodes of Attack on Titan in the franchise's first-ever theatrical experience. After venturing beyond the walls and separated from his comrades, Eren finds himself inspired by this new truth and plots the "Rumbling," a terrifying plan to eradicate every living thing in the world. With the fate of the world hanging in the balance, a motley crew of Eren's former comrades and enemies scramble to halt his deadly mission. The only question is, can they stop him?
synopsis: Attack on Titan: THE LAST ATTACK is a 2024 animation, action and adventure film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 9.2 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 14 certification (AT rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
